Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Hmm the user has provided detailed interview transcripts about an invoice approval process and asked for a structured BPMN like textual model The key is to consolidate the multiple perspectives into a coherent flow while highlighting roles decision points and exceptions

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: First I need to extract the core activities from each interview Marys steps are the most comprehensive but Dan Carlos Rita and Karen add nuances about their roles and exception handling The process clearly starts with invoice receipt and ends with payment scheduling The main decision points are around PO validity matching and manager approval

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: I should structure the output to first outline the happy path then note variations and exceptions The roles are well defined AP Clerk Purchasing Officer Manager AP Supervisor and Supplier Relationship Manager Artifacts like invoices POs and confirmation emails are mentioned

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Ambiguities exist in how discrepancies are resolved sometimes Dan handles it sometimes Karen is involved so Ill use in some cases to reflect that Ritas escalation path for retrospective POs is a critical exception loop The textual model should flow logically mirroring the actual sequence while flagging uncertainties
